title: commiphora pyracanthoides subsp. glandulosa
intro: Commiphora pyracanthoides subsp. glandulosa, commonly known as the Commiphora glandulosa, is a subspecies of the Commiphora pyracanthoides tree, native to certain parts of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and resins. The health benefits of Commiphora glandulosa include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved immune function, as well as potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. Commiphora glandulosa can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, ointments, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
